name: gsa-perdiem-mcp
description: MCP server for GSA Per Diem Rates. Federal travel lodging and M&IE rates for IGCEs and travel cost estimation.
long_description:
Queries the GSA Per Diem Rates API for federal travel lodging and M&IE rates across all CONUS locations. Look up by city, state, or ZIP. Returns monthly lodging rates with seasonal variations, M&IE breakdowns, and first/last day travel rates at 75%.

6 tools. Optional api.data.gov key for 1,000 req/hr. Without a key the server falls back to DEMO_KEY at severe rate limits (30/hr, 50/day).

Hardened across 6 audit rounds with 172 regression tests including a real-key live audit that surfaced 3 P1 silent-wrong-data bugs mocks could not catch. 55 findings fixed. Signature bug: city="Martha’s Vineyard" (typographic apostrophe) silently matched Andover, MA.

perdiem_api_key.title: api.data.gov API Key
perdiem_api_key.description: Free key from https://api.data.gov/signup/. 1,000 req/hr. Same key works for regulations-gov-mcp. DEMO_KEY fallback exists but its 30/hr, 50/day limits are too tight for real use.
